overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character in a red dress walking through a rain-soaked neon-lit urban plaza at night. The character descends stairs, traverses open commercial areas with palm trees and holographic advertisements, and interacts with vending machines in a cyberpunk city environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: concrete stairs leading to urban plaza

events.description: character descends stairs and enters open plaza area with wet pavement
transition from descending stairs to walking on flat plaza ground

agents.ego_description: descending concrete stairs and entering the rain-soaked plaza, walking toward neon-lit buildings

entered.detail: wide concrete stairs with illuminated edges leading down to plaza level
tall palm trees lining the plaza perimeter
large red illuminated billboard with white graphics mounted on building facade
multi-story modern glass building with interior lights visible
rain-soaked pavement reflecting neon lights and building illumination

segments.scene_description: The segment begins with the character descending illuminated concrete stairs into a rain-soaked urban plaza at night. The environment features wet reflective pavement, palm trees lining the right side, and a prominent red digital billboard visible in the distance. The camera follows from behind as the character transitions from the stairs to walking on the flat plaza surface.

scene_state.functional_zone: open commercial plaza with circular seating structure

events.description: passing by circular planter structure with illuminated bench seating

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the plaza passing palm trees and various neon advertisements on surrounding buildings

notable_agents.action: child in bright green shirt running across the wet plaza

entered.detail: circular raised planter with bench seating and interior lighting
storefront with bright cyan neon signage and illuminated windows
large vertical digital screen displaying animated character advertisement

segments.scene_description: The character walks through the open plaza surrounded by palm trees and neon-lit storefronts. A circular planter structure with bench seating appears in the center of the plaza. The wet tiled ground reflects the surrounding cyan and red neon lights. Other pedestrians are scattered throughout the area, including a child running across the plaza.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway under overpass with blue neon lighting

events.description: entering area under overpass with prominent blue neon strip lighting on walls
exiting covered overpass area back into open street with tall buildings

agents.ego_description: walking under the overpass with blue neon lights and continuing along the street lined with tall glass buildings covered in advertisements

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in dark clothing walking ahead in the same direction

entered.detail: concrete overpass creating covered walkway with blue neon accent lighting
horizontal blue neon light strips mounted on wall under overpass
tall skyscraper with multiple vertical digital advertisement screens

segments.scene_description: The character walks under a concrete overpass illuminated by striking blue neon light strips along the walls. After exiting the covered area, the scene opens to a street lined with towering glass buildings covered in vertical digital advertisements. The wet pavement continues to reflect the surrounding neon lights as the character moves deeper into the commercial district.

scene_state.functional_zone: alley corner with vending machines and dumpster

events.description: character stops at blue vending machines to interact with interface
character interacts with vending machine, selecting items from the illuminated display

agents.ego_description: approaching the vending machines in the alley corner and stopping to interact with the interface

notable_agents.action: homeless person sitting on the ground near the chain link fence and dumpster

entered.detail: pair of blue illuminated vending machines with digital displays showing food items
metal chain link fence enclosing utility area behind vending machines
large green metal dumpster with trash bags visible

segments.scene_description: The character enters a narrow alley corner featuring bright blue vending machines against a chain link fence. A homeless person sits on the ground near a green dumpster to the left. The character approaches the vending machines and stops to interact with the illuminated interface, selecting items from the digital menu while the neon glow reflects off the wet concrete ground.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a wide, rain-soaked urban plaza into the cramped, neon-lit confines of a commercial alleyway. It begins with the character descending illuminated concrete stairs onto a wet plaza surface, where palm trees and a distant red digital billboard frame the path. As the character moves forward, the scene expands across a tiled open area reflecting cyan and red lights, passing a circular planter and scattered pedestrians before transitioning under a concrete overpass lined with blue neon strips. The environment then opens into a street of towering glass buildings draped in vertical digital advertisements, which the camera follows until it turns into a narrow alley corner. Finally, the shot settles as the character approaches bright blue vending machines and a chain-link fence, stopping to interact with the glowing interface beside a green dumpster.
